inputs.label: Account Balance (IRA Balance)
inputs.businessContext: Total balance in the retirement account as of December 31 of the previous year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total balance in the retirement account as of December 31 of the previous year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Önceki yılın 31 Aralık tarihi itibarıyla emeklilik hesabındaki toplam bakiye.

inputs.label: Age (Current Year Age)
inputs.businessContext: Age of the account owner as of the current year. Used to determine the life expectancy factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the account owner as of the current year. Used to determine the life expectancy factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesap sahibinin cari yıldaki yaşı. Yaşam beklentisi faktörünü belirlemek için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Spouse Age (if applicable)
inputs.businessContext: Age of spouse if the account owner is married and spouse is the sole beneficiary. Used for joint life expectancy factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of spouse if the account owner is married and spouse is the sole beneficiary. Used for joint life expectancy factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesap sahibi evliyse ve eşi tek varis ise eşin yaşı. Ortak yaşam beklentisi faktörü için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Beneficiary Type
inputs.businessContext: 1 = Spouse sole beneficiary, 2 = Non-spouse beneficiary, 3 = No designated beneficiary. Determines which life expectancy table to use.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 = Spouse sole beneficiary, 2 = Non-spouse beneficiary, 3 = No designated beneficiary. Determines which life expectancy table to use.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 = Eş tek varis, 2 = Eş olmayan varis, 3 = Belirlenmiş varis yok. Hangi yaşam beklentisi tablosunun kullanılacağını belirler.

inputs.label: Life Expectancy Factor (Override)
inputs.businessContext: Optional override for the life expectancy factor. If 0, the factor is calculated based on age and beneficiary type using IRS tables.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional override for the life expectancy factor. If 0, the factor is calculated based on age and beneficiary type using IRS tables.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaşam beklentisi faktörü için isteğe bağlı geçersiz kılma. 0 ise, faktör yaş ve varis türüne göre IRS tabloları kullanılarak hesaplanır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
